Title: Rename Category with a Valid Name
Objective: Verify functionality for renaming a category when entering a valid new name.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Currently on Training Materials Management interface.
ExpectedResult:
Category renamed successfully.
New category name "Foundations" is updated and displayed on UI.

Title: Category Rename Fails Due to Empty Name
Objective: Verify system displays error and prevents renaming category when new name is empty.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Currently on Rename Category dialog.
Steps:
1. Leave new Category Name field empty;
2. Click Save button.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks action.
Validation error message appears: "Category Name cannot be empty."

Title: Verify Archive and Delete Functions Are Not Supported for Category
Objective: Verify system does not support archive or delete operations on categories.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Viewing Category menu.
Steps:
1. Open options menu for Category "Foundations";
2. Check for Archive or Delete options.
ExpectedResult: Archive and Delete buttons are not present in Category context menu.

Title: Verify Default Categories Exist in System
Objective: Verify system contains default fixed categories upon initialization.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Staff.
Steps:
1. Access Training Materials page;
2. Check category sidebar/tabs.
ExpectedResult: Default categories "IT", "English", and "Professional Skills" are present in system.

Title: Create New Course with Valid Information
Objective: Verify functionality for creating a new course within a category.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Category "IT" exists.
ExpectedResult:
Course created successfully.
New course "Web Development" appears under category "IT".

Title: New Course Creation Fails Due to Empty Name
Objective: Verify system displays error when course name is empty.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Staff.
Steps:
1. Leave Course Name field empty;
2. Click Save button.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks action.
Validation error appears: "Course Name is required."

Title: Edit Course Name with Valid Information
Objective: Verify functionality for updating course name.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Course "Web Development" exists.
ExpectedResult: Course name updated successfully to "Frontend Development".

Title: Archive Active Course
Objective: Verify functionality for archiving an active course.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Course "Frontend Development" is Active.
Steps:
1. Click Archive button for course "Frontend Development";
2. Confirm archiving in popup dialog.
ExpectedResult:
Course status changes to Archived.
Course is hidden from Active list and moved to Archived tab.

Title: Restore Archived Course
Objective: Verify functionality for restoring a previously archived course.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Course "Frontend Development" is Archived.
ExpectedResult:
Course status changes back to Active.
Course reappears in active course list.

Title: Verify Permanent Deletion Is Not Supported for Course
Objective: Verify system does not provide permanent deletion for courses.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Viewing course options menu.
Steps:
1. Open course action menu;
2. Check available options.
ExpectedResult: Permanent Delete button is not present for courses (only Archive is supported).

Title: Create New Session with Valid Information
Objective: Verify functionality for creating a new learning session inside a course.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Course "Web Development" exists.
ExpectedResult:
Session created successfully.
"Session 1: HTML Basics" appears inside course.

Title: New Session Creation Fails Due to Empty Session Name
Objective: Verify system displays error when session name is empty.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Staff.
Steps:
1. Leave Session Name field empty;
2. Click Save button.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks action.
Validation error appears: "Session Name is required."

Title: Edit Session Details
Objective: Verify functionality for updating session title/details.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Session "Session 1: HTML Basics" exists.
TestData: OldSessionName="Session 1: HTML Basics"; NewSessionName="Session 1: HTML & CSS Fundamentals"
ExpectedResult: Session details updated successfully.

Title: Permanently Delete Session
Objective: Verify functionality for permanently deleting a session.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Session "Session 1" exists.
Steps:
1. Click Delete icon on session;
2. Confirm permanent deletion in confirmation dialog.
ExpectedResult: Session and all attached materials are permanently deleted from system.

Title: Cancel Session Deletion Operation
Objective: Verify clicking Cancel in session deletion dialog preserves session without deleting.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Session deletion modal open.
Steps:
1. Click Delete icon on session;
2. In confirmation dialog, click Cancel button.
ExpectedResult:
Dialog closes.
Session remains intact in course.

Title: Verify Archive Operation Is Not Supported for Session
Objective: Verify system does not support archiving individual sessions.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Staff.
Steps: 1. Check available actions on session.
ExpectedResult: Archive button is not available for sessions (only Delete is supported).

Title: Create New Exam with Valid Information
Objective: Verify functionality for creating a new exam item inside a course.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Course "Web Development" exists.
ExpectedResult:
Exam created successfully.
"Midterm Exam" displays in exam section of course.

Title: New Exam Creation Fails Due to Empty Name
Objective: Verify system displays error when exam name is empty.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Staff.
Steps:
1. Leave Exam Name field empty;
2. Click Save button.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks action.
Validation error appears: "Exam Name is required."

Title: Edit Exam Details
Objective: Verify functionality for updating exam title/details.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Exam "Midterm Exam" exists.
ExpectedResult: Exam details updated successfully.

Title: Permanently Delete Exam
Objective: Verify functionality for permanently deleting an exam.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Exam "Midterm Exam" exists.
Steps:
1. Click Delete icon on exam;
2. Confirm permanent deletion in confirmation dialog.
ExpectedResult: Exam and all attached exam materials are permanently deleted from system.

Title: Cancel Exam Deletion Operation
Objective: Verify clicking Cancel in exam deletion dialog preserves exam without deleting.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Exam deletion modal open.
Steps:
1. Click Delete icon on exam;
2. In confirmation dialog, click Cancel button.
ExpectedResult:
Dialog closes.
Exam remains intact in course.

Title: Verify Archive Operation Is Not Supported for Exam
Objective: Verify system does not support archiving individual exams.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Staff.
Steps: 1. Check available actions on exam.
ExpectedResult: Archive button is not available for exams (only Delete is supported).

Title: Attach a Valid Document Link to Session/Exam
Objective: Verify functionality for attaching a valid Google Drive material link with a label.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Session or Exam exists.
ExpectedResult: Material link is attached successfully and clickable on UI.

Title: Attach Multiple Valid Document Links to Session/Exam
Objective: Verify functionality for attaching multiple document links simultaneously.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Staff.
ExpectedResult: All material links are attached and displayed under session/exam.

Title: Attach Material with Completely Empty Row (Ignore Blank Rows)
Objective: Verify system ignores completely blank material rows without raising error.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Staff.
ExpectedResult: System saves Row 1 successfully and ignores blank Row 2 without error.

Title: Attach Material Fails Due to Label Provided with Empty URL
Objective: Verify system displays error when Label is filled but URL is empty.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Staff.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks action.
Validation error appears: "URL is required when Label is specified."

Title: Attach Material Fails Due to URL Provided with Empty Label
Objective: Verify system displays error when URL is filled but Label is empty.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Staff.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks action.
Validation error appears: "Label is required when URL is specified."

Title: Attach Material Fails Due to Non-Google Drive Link Domain
Objective: Verify system restricts material links to Google Drive domain.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Staff.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks action.
Validation error appears: "Material link must be a valid Google Drive URL."

Title: Export Session List to CSV File (Export CSV)
Objective: Verify functionality for exporting course session list to a downloadable CSV file.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Course contains sessions.
Steps:
1. Open Course "Web Development";
2. Click Export CSV button.
ExpectedResult: CSV file downloads successfully containing Session ID, Session Name, and Material details.

Title: Import CSV - Update Information of Existing Session
Objective: Verify importing CSV with matching Session ID updates existing session details.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Session ID "SES-001" exists in system.
Steps:
1. Upload CSV containing updated name for SES-001;
2. Click Import CSV button.
ExpectedResult: Session SES-001 is updated with new name "Updated HTML Basics".

Title: Import CSV - Create New Session when Session ID Is Blank
Objective: Verify importing CSV row with empty Session ID creates a brand new session.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Staff.
Steps:
1. Upload CSV containing blank Session ID row;
2. Click Import CSV button.
ExpectedResult: New session "New CSS Grid Session" is created with auto-generated Session ID.

Title: Import CSV - Create New Session when Session ID Does Not Exist in System
Objective: Verify importing CSV row with non-existent Session ID creates a new session.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Session ID "SES-999" does not exist.
Steps:
1. Upload CSV containing non-existent Session ID;
2. Click Import CSV button.
ExpectedResult: New session "Flexbox Guide" is created in system.

Title: Import CSV - Existing Sessions Omitted from CSV Are Retained
Objective: Verify importing CSV does not delete existing sessions that are absent from the CSV file.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Sessions SES-001 and SES-002 exist.
Steps:
1. Upload CSV containing only SES-001;
2. Perform CSV import.
ExpectedResult: SES-001 is processed, and omitted session SES-002 remains unchanged in system without being deleted.

Title: Import CSV - Skip Materials Column in Uploaded CSV File
Objective: Verify system ignores Materials column when importing session CSV file.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Staff.
Steps:
1. Upload CSV containing Materials column;
2. Click Import CSV button.
ExpectedResult: Sessions are updated/created, and Materials column is safely ignored per business rule.

Title: Import CSV Fails Due to Incorrect File Format (Non-CSV File)
Objective: Verify system rejects non-CSV file formats during import.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Staff.
Steps:
1. Select non-CSV file "materials.pdf" in import dialog;
2. Click Import CSV button.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks import.
Error message appears: "Invalid file format. Please upload a CSV file."

Title: Import CSV Fails for Rows Missing Session Name
Objective: Verify system skips or flags error for CSV rows missing mandatory Session Name.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Staff.
Steps:
1. Upload CSV containing row with empty Session Name;
2. Click Import CSV button.
ExpectedResult: System flags error for row or skips invalid row with warning message: "Session Name is required."

Title: Access Control - Staff Role Has Full Management Access
Objective: Verify Staff users have full CRUD permissions for categories, courses, sessions, exams, and materials.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Staff.
Steps:
1. Access Training Materials module;
2. Verify presence of Create, Edit, Archive, and Delete buttons.
ExpectedResult: Staff user can perform all management operations cleanly.

Title: Access Control - Student Role Has Read-Only Access
Objective: Verify Student users can view training materials but cannot create, edit, or delete items.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Student.
Steps:
1. Access Training Materials module as Student;
2. Check for management buttons.
ExpectedResult:
Create, Edit, Archive, Delete, and CSV Import buttons are completely hidden.
Student can view and open material links in Read-Only mode.

Title: Access Control - External Domain Accounts Are Denied Access
Objective: Verify accounts outside organizational domains are denied access.
Preconditions: User attempts access with external personal account.
Steps: 1. Attempt to access Training Materials URL with external email.
ExpectedResult: Access denied page or login redirect is displayed.

Title: Verify Auto-hiding All Child Sessions/Exams When Course Is Archived
Objective: Verify archiving a course automatically hides all nested sessions and exams.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Course "Web Development" contains 3 sessions and 1 exam.
Steps:
1. Archive course "Web Development";
2. View course list as Student.
ExpectedResult: Course and all its child sessions and exams are hidden from active view.

Title: Verify Restoring All Child Sessions/Exams When Course Is Restored
Objective: Verify restoring an archived course restores visibility of all nested sessions and exams.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Course "Web Development" is Archived.
Steps:
1. Restore course "Web Development";
2. View active course list.
ExpectedResult: Course and all child sessions and exams reappear in active view.
